LBank Will Suspend Deposit and Withdrawal of GLMR (MOONBEAM)



LBank Will Suspend Deposit and Withdrawal of GLMR (MOONBEAM)

2026-07-13 11:37

Dear LBank users,
 
Due to the network upgrade, LBank will suspend the deposit and withdrawal of GLMR (MOONBEAM) at 12:00 on July 13, 2026 (UTC) to support the network upgrade and ensure a better user experience.

For more information, please refer to the project's announcement: https://forum.moonbeam.network/t/runtime-rt4401-schedule/2495

We apologize for any inconvenience caused to you.
 
Thank you for your support!
⚠️ In case of any discrepancies in translation, the English version shall prevail.
